goal: Realistic read-only QA drill for manager-test-app PR #1, focused on verifying the current app branch and producing evidence without merging.

acceptance_criteria: Worker reports manager-test-app PR #1 URL/state and confirms it remains unmerged.
Worker reports lint, test, and build results for the current app branch.
Worker reports a dev-server smoke result or an explicit blocker if not practical.
Worker assesses camera permission/error and audio alarm enable/mute QA surfaces from code or README.
Manager records accepted criteria and satisfies them with evidence before finish-task.
guidelines: Use the absolute workerctl commands shown in your bootstrap prompt; the app repo cwd does not contain scripts/workerctl.
Keep this drill read-only for manager-test-app: no commits, pushes, or merges.
When satisfied, finish the workerctl task normally without stop flags; the operator will run post-finish transcript capture and cleanup to validate issue #81.
manager_config.objective: Supervise a read-only QA worker on manager-test-app PR #1, verify command evidence, record criteria, and finish only when evidence is sufficient. Do not merge PR #1.

name: manager-test-phone-lunk-readonly-qa-20260519
summary: Third realistic manager/worker drill after post-finish transcript recovery fix.
